Inside a sleek military van parked outside the hospital, Morgan sat at the back, her brows furrowed tightly as she stared intently at the figure who sneaked into the Gate.

"Though the adventurer slipped in without our notice but saved the team’s lives, I’m going to let this one slide... But what I don’t understand is how she left the Gate without us seeing her...?" Morgan muttered.

"Not only that, the Gate also seemed to fluctuate immediately after she stepped in." Yuri beside her noted.

"Team leader, Captain." A young female analyst suddenly entered. She wore a lab coat just like Yuri’s.

"What is it...?" Yuri asked.

"Team leader. From our analysis, the female adventurer left the dungeon without taking any monster cores..."

"Huh...? You mean she just killed and left?"

"Yes and not only that, a building not far from the Gate site was crashed into by an unknown individual." She said while showing a tablet to both of them. "And not far from there, a large human-shaped imprint was found on a wall in an alley with some residents claiming to have heard a loud crash that night. Even a lamppost was knocked down not too far away."

"There seems to be a pattern." Yuri said quietly.

Morgan seemed to think about something before speaking. "We need to investigate further. Let’s check out these sites first."
